CustomField.formula: People_Trained_Another_Related_Accred__c + People_Trained_Fitting_Air_Ground_HP__c + No_People_Fitting_Other_Retrofit__c + No_People_Fitting_Other_Retrofit__c + No_People_Fitting_Solar_PV_Thermal__c + No_People_PAS_2035_Trustmark__c + People_Trained_Retrofit_Proj_Mgmt__c
CustomField.label: Total Number of People Trained
